  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view

Uses of Package
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view

Packages that use uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view
Managed viewports and stateful data interpretation for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources
Provides UI components for managing and interacting with multimodal resources.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.view
Provides specialized UI components for viewing and editing managed resources.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources
Provides the URI-centric engine for the management and surgical mutation of multimodal resources.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view used by uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
    Class
    Description
    ResourceView
    The perspective through which a resource is viewed by the model.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view used by uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view
    Class
    Description
    AbstractResourceView
    Base implementation for resource views providing parent resource management.
    ResourceView
    The perspective through which a resource is viewed by the model.
    TextViewport
    The V2 Universal Streaming Viewport Engine.
    TextViewportSettings
    Encapsulates adjustable viewport configuration for V2 text resources.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view used by uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources
    Class
    Description
    MediaView
    A resource view that interprets content as binary media (images, audio, etc.).
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view used by uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.view
    Class
    Description
    MediaView
    A resource view that interprets content as binary media (images, audio, etc.).
    ResourceView
    The perspective through which a resource is viewed by the model.
    TextView
    A resource view that interprets content as plain text.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view used by uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources
    Class
    Description
    TextViewportSettings
    Encapsulates adjustable viewport configuration for V2 text resources.
